rationale: The only direct linkage evidence is a single DOI-matched reference entry (reference_index 85) with no surrounding citation context or quoted text, so substantive use cannot be verified. The papers do share plausible conceptual overlap on network/tie structure and information diversity/redundancy mechanisms (weak ties in WOM vs. connectivity/clustering effects), which makes an incidental-only drop unsafe. Because evidence is sparse but potentially meaningful, this pair is best treated as uncertain.
